channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Full Crew
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.title: [Gold Job] KTSHIP - ASAP vacancies - 18 JUN at
[Gold Job] KTSHIP - ASAP vacancies - 03 JUNE at
[Gold Job] KTSHIP - ASAP slots - 27 MAY at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Real Ships. Real Management. No Middlemen.

UNIMANAGER SIA is the technical management arm of Unimars Group — operating since 2003, incorporated in 2017, and managing a diversified fleet of 4 vessels right now. We do not chase paper contracts. We run ships.

Our Fleet — Active, Not on Paper:

  • MV EKATERINA (IMO 9158458)

  • MV AMALIYA (IMO 9312341)

  • MV LUCKY VOYAGER (IMO 9393632)

  • MV LUCKY FINDER (IMO 9393620)

These are real vessels with real sailing schedules, real maintenance cycles, and real crews. You will know exactly which ship you are joining before you sign.

What We Offer:

  • Direct technical management — we handle everything in-house: ISM, ISPS, MLC, insurance, claims, procurement, accounting

  • Full regulatory compliance — ISO standards, OVID, CMID, flag-state liaison. Your certificates and paperwork are managed properly, not lost in a drawer

  • Dry-dock & repair exposure — we supervise newbuildings, conversions, lay-ups, and major repairs. Grow your technical skills, not just your sea time

  • Stable Latvian/European employer — Riga-based operations, transparent payroll, no hidden deductions

  • Consistent monitoring & asset care — we maintain vessel value and safety standards, not just tick boxes for auditors

Who We Need:

  • Masters & Chief Mates

  • Chief Engineers & Second Engineers

  • ETOs & electricians

  • Bosuns & deck ratings

  • Engine room ratings (motormen, oilers, wipers)

  • Cooks & stewards

  • Safety officers & designated persons ashore (DPA)

  • Technical superintendents

  • Purchasers & logistics coordinators

  • Vetting inspectors & internal auditors

What You Bring:

  • Valid STCW certificates and flag-state endorsements

  • Experience on general cargo, multipurpose, or similar vessel types

  • Commitment to ISM/ISPS/MLC compliance — we run a tight ship, literally

  • Willingness to work with a Latvian-European management team — professional, direct, no bureaucracy for the sake of it

Why UNIMANAGER?

We are not a crewing agency with 200 ships on a PowerPoint slide. We manage 4 vessels hands-on, and we know every bolt on every ship. If you want stability, transparency, and a management company that answers the phone when you call — this is it.

Open applications welcome. Send your full CV with sea service record and certificates.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Marine Officers & Crew — UNIMANAGER SIA (Riga, Latvia | 4 Vessels Under Management) at UNIMANAGER SIA
[Gold Job] KTSHIP - Masters, Chief officers - for 11-14K TEU container vessels at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Work with a Contractor That Knows the Industry — Since 1984

Davai Bridge & Tunnel is not a crewing agency that promises the world and disappears. We are a private-owned international contractor founded in 1984, operating across Denmark, Sweden, Norway, Turkey, the UK, and Lithuania. We build, renovate, and maintain bridges, wind turbines, and offshore structures — and we need proven maritime and offshore professionals to keep our projects running.

What We Offer:

  • Direct employment with a stable European contractor — not a middleman

  • Offshore & onshore rotations across major European projects

  • Full GWO certification support — we invest in your training

  • Competitive day rates paid on time, every time

  • Fast mobilization — our database means we call the right people, fast

Who We Need Right Now:

  • Offshore technicians (Full GWO Package)

  • IRATA rope access specialists (Level I / II / III)

  • Certified welders (135, 136, 138) — steel & aluminium

  • Shipbuilders (steel & aluminium)

  • Industrial & marine painters / sandblasters

  • FROSIO coating inspectors

  • Scaffold builders

  • Crane operators

  • QC/QA steel & coating inspectors

  • Ventilation & steel construction specialists

  • Concrete & reinforcement workers

What You Bring:

  • Valid offshore certificates (GWO, IRATA, welding certs, FROSIO — we verify, but we also help you get there)

  • Experience on bridges, wind turbines, ships, or offshore platforms

  • Willingness to travel across Europe for project-based work

  • Professional attitude — we work in teams, not alone

Why Davai? We maintain a large database of certified specialists who have worked on projects all over Europe. When you join us, you join a crew that knows the job, respects deadlines, and delivers quality. We do not send unprepared people to site — we train, certify, and deploy.

Unsolicited applications welcome. We are always looking for independent, qualified, and motivated people — women and men — for training and immediate deployment.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Offshore & Maritime Personnel at Davai Bridge & Tunnel AS

item.title: [AI Job] Crane Operator Stage 3 and AB on MPSV – STCW Required at OJ Crew

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Our respective client is seeking crew (Master/OOW/MM) for Guard vessels. Start Date: 15.05.2026. Contract: 1 month +/- 1 month. Good working conditions. Possible rotational employment. Taxes paid by the employer.

Requirements:

  • Valid STCW certificates
  • Medical Certificate
  • Good English
  • Valid CoC (Master/OOW – II/2, II/1; MM – III/4 or III/5)
  • Experience in rank on similar fleet (advantage)
  • Candidates without offshore experience are considered.
If interested and available, please send your CV.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master, OOW, and Marine Engineer Positions on Guard Vessels – STCW and CoC Required at OJ Crew
